overall.description: First-person exploration through a grand gothic building with ornate staircases, medical rooms, and a steam carriage, transitioning to an outdoor overlook of a coastal city at golden hour. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with Victorian architecture and atmospheric lighting.

ornate iron gate blocking the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a grand entrance hall with marble floors and red cables running across the ground. Wooden paneling lines the left wall while large potted plants sit to the right. The camera turns left toward a grand staircase at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate staircase with hanging fabric light fixture

events.description: entering the enclosed staircase from the ground floor hall
reaching the top landing and approaching the upper floor door

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase with black metal railings, passing under a large hanging fabric light fixture

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn edges and dark marble pattern
black wrought iron railing with decorative scrollwork
large bell-shaped fabric light fixture hanging from the ceiling
high vaulted ceiling with ornate moldings

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the grand staircase, moving from the open hall into a more enclosed stairwell. The stone steps and black metal railings lead upward past a large hanging fabric light fixture. The architecture features high arched ceilings with detailed moldings.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical room with blood stains and arched ceilings

events.description: entering upper room with medical equipment and blood-stained walls
turning right toward the arched exit doorway

agents.ego_description: moving through a medical room with blood stains on the walls, passing wooden chests and equipment

circular chandelier with multiple white globes hanging from ceiling
dark wooden chest with metal bands and a small ladder beside it
tall arched doorway leading to the main hall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters an upper room with arched ceilings and disturbing blood stains on the plaster walls. A medical chandelier hangs from above, illuminating wooden chests and equipment. The camera moves toward an arched doorway leading to another area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main transit hall with steam carriage and danger signage

events.description: entering main hall with glass ceiling and metal support columns
encountering a guard in red uniform and mask standing in the hall
approaching and circling the stationary steam carriage

agents.ego_description: entering the main hall, passing a guard in red uniform, and approaching the steam carriage to examine it

notable_agents.action: guard in red coat and metal mask standing still facing the camera

entered.detail: large arched glass and wood doorway leading to the hall
dark brown steam-powered carriage with large wheels and N°203 marking
white sign with red text reading DANGER hanging from ceiling
cluster of green glass spherical lights suspended from ceiling
skylight ceiling with metal framework allowing natural light

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a grand hall with a glass ceiling and metal support columns, encountering a guard in a red uniform. The hall features a stationary steam carriage marked N°203 and green hanging lights. The camera approaches and circles the vehicle before heading toward an exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor viewpoint overlooking coastal city at sunset

events.description: exiting the building to an outdoor overlook with panoramic city view
panning right to reveal the coastal cityscape and mountains

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the outdoor balcony and panning across the panoramic view of the coastal city at sunset

tall mountains rising behind the city with misty peaks
golden orange and yellow sky with scattered clouds at dusk
ornate stone balustrade along the edge of the overlook
brass telescope on tripod for viewing the distant city

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto an outdoor balcony overlooking a vast coastal city bathed in golden hour light. The view encompasses distant mountains, a sprawling urban area, and flying vehicles in the sky. A brass telescope stands on the stone railing as the camera pans across the scenic vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the opulent yet unsettling interior of a gothic estate that eventually opens onto a breathtaking coastal vista. It begins in a grand entrance hall with marble floors and red cables, gliding past wooden paneling and potted plants before turning toward a sweeping staircase. As the camera ascends the stone steps and passes under a hanging fabric fixture, the space shifts from the open hall into an enclosed stairwell with high arched ceilings, eventually leading into a medical room marked by blood-stained walls and a specialized chandelier. The scene then expands into a vast hall under a glass ceiling, where the camera circles a stationary steam carriage and a uniformed guard before heading toward the exit. Finally, the camera emerges onto an outdoor balcony, where the interior shadows give way to the golden hour light of a sprawling coastal city complete with flying vehicles and distant mountains.
